---
title: "Teaching Materials"
description: "Lecture slides and student handouts for the courses I teach, organised by discipline, language, and year."
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

These are the materials I prepare for the practical classes and seminars I teach as an assistant professor in the Department of Social Medicine and Public Health, MU–Plovdiv. They accompany the courses I assist in, are developed together with my colleagues in the department, and are free for my students and anyone else to use for study.

Pick a **discipline**, then a **language**, and each year is split into two separate collections — *lecture slides* and *student handouts*. The academic-year selector opens on the most recent materials; earlier cohorts stay available as an archive rather than being overwritten. Use the search box to look across everything at once, or click a tag to narrow things down. If you find an error, please [email me](mailto:kostadinr.kostadinov@mu-plovdiv.bg).

::: {#teaching-app}
Loading teaching materials…
:::

Looking for the AI study notebooks? They now live on the [Study guides](study-guide.qmd) page.

```{=html}
<script src="assets/teaching-data.js"></script>
<script src="assets/teaching.js"></script>
```
